de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang

Class WellDefinednessCheck

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.WellDefinednessCheck
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Contract, SpecificationElement
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    ClassWellDefinedness, MethodWellDefinedness, StatementWellDefinedness

    public abstract class WellDefinednessCheck
extends Object
implements Contract
    A contract for checking the well-definedness of a jml specification element (i.e. a class invariant, a method contract, a model field or any jml statement), consisting of precondition, assignable-clause, postcondition, accessible-clause, measured-by-clause and represents-clause.
    Author:
    Michael Kirsten

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      (package private) static class  WellDefinednessCheck.Condition
      A static data structure for storing and passing two terms, denoting the implicit and the explicit part of a pre- or post-condition.
      static class  WellDefinednessCheck.POTerms
      A data structure for storing and passing all specifications of a specification element includinf pre- and post-condition, an assignable-clause and a list of all other clauses specified.
      static class  WellDefinednessCheck.TermAndFunc
      A static data structure for passing a term with a function.
      private static class  WellDefinednessCheck.TermListAndFunc
      A static data structure for passing a term list with a function.
      (package private) static class  WellDefinednessCheck.Type 

      • Nested classes/interfaces inherited from interface de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.Contract

        Contract.OriginalVariables

    • Method Detail

      • sort

        private Pair<ImmutableList<Term>,ImmutableList<Term>> sort(Term spec)
        Splits and sorts a (specification) term in such a way that implicit parts are in the first and explicit parts in the second list.
        Parameters:
        spec - specification term
        Returns:
        two lists for implicit and explicit specification parts

      • split

        private WellDefinednessCheck.Condition split(Term spec)
        Splits a (specification) term into implicit and explicit parts (i.e. as written in the specification) and reforms the conjunction in a sorted way, where implicit parts appear first, and also labeled with the short-circuit term label.
        Parameters:
        spec - specification term
        Returns:
        sorted and short-circuit conjuncted specification term

      • replace

        private WellDefinednessCheck.Condition replace(WellDefinednessCheck.Condition pre,
                                               Contract.OriginalVariables newVars)

        Returns:

        private WellDefinednessCheck.TermListAndFunc buildFreePre(Term implicitPre,

                                                          ParsableVariable heap,
                                                          ImmutableList<ParsableVariable> params,
                                                          boolean taclet,
                                                          Services services)
        Builds the "general assumption"
        Parameters:
        implicitPre - the implicit precondition
        self - self variable
        heap - heap variable
        params - list of parameter variables
        taclet - boolean is true if used for a wd-taclet
        services -
        Returns:
        The Term containing the general assumptions.

                                        Term find1,

                                        Term goal2,

        Conjoins two well-definedness taclets for pure method invocations

        find1 - first find term
        find2 - second find term
        goal1 - first precondition
        goal2 - second precondition

      • createTaclet

        static final RewriteTaclet createTaclet(String name,
                                        Term callee,
                                        Term callTerm,
                                        Term pre,
                                        boolean isStatic,
                                        TermServices services)
        Creates new well-definedness taclet for either an invariant reference or a pure method invocation.
        Parameters:
        name - taclet name
        callee - the receiver variable as a term
        callTerm - the whole invocation term
        pre - the method's or invariant's precondition
        isStatic - a boolean to tell if the method is static
        services -
        Returns:
        created taclet

                                           Term callTerm,
                                           TermServices services)

        Parameters:
        name - taclet name
        callTerm - the whole invocation term
        services -
        Returns:
        created taclet with false as replacewith term

      • getBehaviour

        public abstract String getBehaviour()
        Detects the specification element's behaviour
        Returns:
        behaviour string

      • modelField

        public abstract boolean modelField()
        Detects if the specification element is a true (i.e. not an invariant) model field
        Returns:
        true for model fields

      • getAxiom

        public abstract Term getAxiom()
        Only for contracts with model_behaviour, the result is different from null.
        Returns:
        the return value of a model method (null otherwise)

      • combine

        public WellDefinednessCheck combine(WellDefinednessCheck wdc,
                                    TermServices services)
        Combines two well-definedness checks having the same name, id, target, type, behaviour and are either both model fields or both not a model field.
        Parameters:
        wdc - the well-definedness check to be combined with the current one
        services -
        Returns:
        the combined well-definedness contract

      • isOn

        public static final boolean isOn()
        This method checks, if well-definedness checks are generally turned on or off.
        Returns:
        true if on and false if off

      • createPOTerms

        public final WellDefinednessCheck.POTerms createPOTerms()
        collects terms for precondition, assignable clause and other specification elements, and postcondition & signals-clause

      • addRepresents

        public final WellDefinednessCheck addRepresents(Term rep)

      • getPre

        public final WellDefinednessCheck.TermAndFunc getPre(WellDefinednessCheck.Condition pre,
                                                     ParsableVariable self,
                                                     ParsableVariable heap,
                                                     ImmutableList<? extends ParsableVariable> parameters,
                                                     boolean taclet,
                                                     Services services)
        Gets the full valid precondition, which holds in the element's pre-state.
        Parameters:
        pre - the precondition with the original variables
        self - the new self variable
        heap - the new heap variable
        parameters - the new parameter list
        taclet - is true if the precondition will be used in a taclet
        services -
        Returns:
        the full valid pre-condition assumed in the pre-state including the measured-by function

      • getPost

        public final Term getPost(WellDefinednessCheck.Condition post,
                          ParsableVariable result,
                          TermServices services)
        Gets the full valid post-condition
        Parameters:
        post - post-condition with original variables
        result - the new result variable
        services -
        Returns:
        the full valid post-condition

      • getUpdates

        public final Term getUpdates(Term mod,
                             LocationVariable heap,
                             ProgramVariable heapAtPre,
                             Term anonHeap,
                             TermServices services)
        Gets the necessary updates applicable to the post-condition
        Parameters:
        mod - the assignable-clause
        heap - the current heap variable
        heapAtPre - the current variable for the heap of the pre-state
        anonHeap - the anonymous heap term
        services -
        Returns:
        the applicable update term including an update for old-expressions and the anonymisation update

      • getName

        public final String getName()
        Description copied from interface: SpecificationElement
        Returns the unique internal name of the specification element.
        Specified by:
        getName in interface SpecificationElement

      • id

        public final int id()
        Description copied from interface: Contract
        Returns the id number of the contract. If a contract has instances for several methods (inheritance!), all instances have the same id. The id is either non-negative or equal to INVALID_ID.
        Specified by:
        id in interface Contract

      • getMby

        public final Term getMby()
        Specified by:
        getMby in interface Contract

      • proofToString

        public final String proofToString(Services services)
        Description copied from interface: Contract
        Returns a parseable String representation of the contract. Precondition: toBeSaved() must be true.
        Specified by:
        proofToString in interface Contract

      • getDisplayName

        Description copied from interface: SpecificationElement
        Returns the displayed name.
        Specified by:
        getDisplayName in interface SpecificationElement

      • toBeSaved

        public final boolean toBeSaved()
        Description copied from interface: Contract
        Tells whether, on saving a proof where this contract is available, the contract should be saved too. (this is currently true for contracts specified directly in DL, but not for JML contracts)
        Specified by:
        toBeSaved in interface Contract

      • hasSelfVar

        public final boolean hasSelfVar()
        Description copied from interface: Contract
        Checks if a self variable is originally provided.
        Specified by:
        hasSelfVar in interface Contract
        Returns:
        true self variable is originally provided, false no self variable available.

      • getOrigVars

        public final Contract.OriginalVariables getOrigVars()
        Description copied from interface: Contract
        Returns the original ProgramVariables to replace them easier. The second list consists of the parameters.
        Specified by:
        getOrigVars in interface Contract
